plugin.name: ZIDE
plugin.description:
ZIDE — Tomcat server management and ZIDE integration for IntelliJ IDEA.
  • Add, edit, and remove Tomcat servers from the SAS-ZIDE tool window
  • Run and Debug servers with JPDA auto-attach support
  • Deploy sync on file create, edit, move, and delete
  • ANT build integration and hot-swap on save
  • New Project Wizard with CMTools integration
  • Database reinit (PostgreSQL + MySQL) with postgres_functions.sql
  • Auto-configure project libraries and deployment patching
  • Auto-update from GitHub releases on startup
